abstract: Prezi’s underlying document model is continuously evolving as we add new features, and it must work on various platforms (web, mobile, desktop and backend) perfectly even when different clients participate in a collaborative editing session. In this talk I will demonstrate how we keep things working with a combination of code generation, type safety and property based testing with the help of Scala. Speaker: Daniel Vigovszky About Daniel, in his own words: I started my career with developing a CAD software for 7 years at Kotem, then joined Prezi and worked on various backend projects leading to my current position where in the last 2.5 years I was working on Prezi's document and collaboration services, and also on introducing Scala for Prezi's backend teams
event_title: Scala at Prezi: Keeping a multi-platform, continuously evolving DOM consistent
title: Scala at Prezi: Keeping a multi-platform, continuously evolving DOM consistent
